headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: Kanban meets your AI coding workflow.
subtitle: Claude Board brings a visual Kanban board and live terminal streaming to Claude Code. Manage AI-powered dev tasks across projects, on the web or desktop — the command center your AI setup deserves.

headline: RISING STAR
title: Conversations that branch, not just scroll.
subtitle: NodePad turns every AI message into a node on an infinite canvas, letting you explore parallel threads and map your thinking spatially. For power users who've long outgrown the chat window.

headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: Share a secret. Once. Then it's gone.
subtitle: SecretDrop wraps your passwords and API keys in end-to-end encryption and sends them as self-destructing links — no account, no plain-text storage, no trace left behind.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Your messaging life, visualized beautifully.
subtitle: Deeper hooks into your local Beeper app to surface ghosting patterns, conversation timelines, and sent-vs-received breakdowns across iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, and more — entirely on-device.
